title: Magmachines
description: Ever wanted a new use for magma? With this mod, you can convert magma into forge energy to fuel machines!
body:
MAGMACHINES

HOW TO USE

Place a blcock of encased magma, then place a heat transferer down on top of it. place any machine or energy transportation block on top of it, and the power is put to use!

DISCLAIMER

This mod will only work when other mods using forge energy are installed!

Feel free to request compatibility with your mod!
